    labelCounter attack! - Part 14 (0-0)
    titleCounter attack! - Part 14
    typekill
    completeDescriptionAdmiral McArthur: “Hmm…. that took longer than I expected… Maybe your reputation was a bit exaggerated? Anyway.. we got a lot of work to do here. The key to victory in any war is knowledge about the opponent. How do they operate? What are their strong points? Weak points? Habits? Engage a couple of Skirmishers and Cluster bombers, and we’ll observe their behaviour from here.
